name: Julley
description: A free, no-login web tool that retells any school topic through a student's own place and mother tongue, and adds one hands-on task using materials around them. One serverless Claude Haiku call composes the lesson natively in the chosen language across 37 languages, with a spirit line from the philosophy. It refuses to produce exam answers or essays to submit and reteaches the concept instead. Permanently free: no accounts, no payments, no data collected. Three pages (learn flow, /sonam dedication, /about) and three julley_ tables. Dedicated to Sonam Wangchuk.
